prompt: A large abstract mosaic. Hundreds of small identical teardrop shapes, every single one pointing LEFT. Their collective arrangement forms one large teardrop shape — pointing RIGHT. The same shape exists at two scales simultaneously, facing opposite directions. Black background, white teardrops, high contrast, no text, no symbols, no watermarks. Square format.(1024*1024px)
visual_logic: Hundreds of teardrops each point left. Their collective arrangement forms one large shape pointing right. The individual truth and the group truth are opposite, simultaneous, and both undeniable. What is true of every part is false for the whole.
